data.title: Eightco Reveals AI-Focused Treasury and Major Worldcoin Stake
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Eightco Holdings ( (ORBS) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 16, 2026, Eightco Holdings detailed its treasury composition and strategic positions ahead of the April 17 World Lift Off event, underscoring its holding of 277 million Worldcoin (WLD) tokens, about 9% of circulating supply and the largest publicly disclosed institutional stake. Senior management and board member Tom Lee will attend the invite-only World ID launch gathering, highlighting Eightco’s alignment with Proof-of-Human technology as bots now make up an estimated majority of global web traffic.

The company reported a treasury that includes $90 million in OpenAI equity, $25 million in Beast Industries equity, 11,068 ETH, its WLD position and $112 million in cash and equivalents, anchoring its exposure to artificial intelligence, digital identity and the creator economy. By concentrating a significant share of its balance sheet in OpenAI, Worldcoin and Beast Industries, Eightco is tying its fortunes to the growth of consumer AI, human verification networks and large-scale creator-led businesses, a strategy that could amplify both upside potential and sensitivity to volatility in digital assets and private-market valuations.

Spark’s Take on ORBS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ORBS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large recent losses and consistently negative cash flow) and bearish technical signals (below major moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation support is limited given losses and no dividend yield, partially offset by positive corporate events and funding/strategy updates.

To see Spark’s full report on ORBS stock, click here.

More about Eightco Holdings

Eightco Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: ORBS) is a publicly traded holding company that offers investors single-ticker exposure to three major innovation themes: artificial intelligence through a pre-IPO equity stake in OpenAI, digital identity via its position as the largest public holder of Worldcoin’s WLD token and the Proof-of-Human protocol, and the creator economy through its equity stake in MrBeast’s Beast Industries. Backed by institutional investors including BitMine Immersion, ARK Invest and Payward/Kraken, the company is positioning itself as part of the infrastructure layer for human verification in the emerging agentic AI era.

On April 15, 2026, Southern First Bancshares, Inc. priced an underwritten public offering of 1,050,000 shares of common stock at $54.00 per share, with a 30‑day option for underwriters to purchase up to an additional 157,500 shares. data.title: MAIA Expands THIO-101 Lung Cancer Trial in U.S.
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. ( (MAIA) ).

MAIA Biotechnology, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in targeted immuno-oncology therapies, is developing ateganosine (THIO), a first-in-class telomere-targeting agent for telomerase-positive non-small cell lung cancer patients who have exhausted standard checkpoint inhibitor treatments. The company’s focus on later-line NSCLC and its FDA Fast Track designation underscore its ambition to address a large, underserved population with limited therapeutic options.

On April 16, 2026, MAIA activated the first U.S. clinical site, at Summit Medical Group in New Jersey, for its ongoing international Phase 2 THIO-101 expansion trial evaluating ateganosine as a third-line treatment for advanced non-small cell lung cancer. The U.S. expansion, backed by a $2.3 million NIH grant and following 2025 data showing disease control, response, and survival outcomes well above standard benchmarks with an acceptable safety profile, significantly broadens the patient pool and strengthens MAIA’s position in the competitive NSCLC landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (MAIA) stock is a Buy with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. stock, see the MAIA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MAIA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MAIA is a Neutral.

MAIA Biotechnology presents a mixed outlook. The company’s financial performance is weak due to its development-stage status and lack of revenue, contributing to a low financial performance score. However, recent positive trial results and technical indicators showing short-term upward momentum provide a more optimistic view. Valuation remains challenging due to negative earnings, but the potential for significant clinical advancements offers upside potential.

To see Spark’s full report on MAIA stock, click here.

More about MAIA Biotechnology, Inc.

MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. is a Chicago-based clinical-stage biopharmaceutical and immuno-oncology company developing targeted therapies for cancer. Its lead program is ateganosine (THIO), a first-in-class telomere-targeting agent in clinical development for non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), focused on patients with telomerase-positive cancer cells who have progressed beyond current checkpoint inhibitor regimens.

The company aims to commercialize novel mechanisms of action that meaningfully improve and extend the lives of cancer patients. MAIA holds U.S. FDA Fast Track designation for its lead drug in advanced NSCLC, positioning it to potentially benefit from expedited regulatory review pathways in a setting where treatment options remain limited.

On April 16, 2026, Bit Origin entered into a securities purchase agreement with an institutional buyer to issue up to $5 million in senior convertible notes, initially closing on a $500,000 note maturing in 2030 and convertible into Class A ordinary shares at $2.76 per share. data.description:

MiMedx Group ( (MDXG) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 14, 2026, MiMedx initiated a restructuring and cost reduction program designed to prioritize growth areas, streamline operations and materially lower operating expenses, including eliminating the Chief Operating Officer role held by Ricci Whitlow, whose departure was not related to any disagreement with the company. As part of the initiative, CEO Joe Capper’s salary was cut by 20% and other named executives’ pay by 10% through year-end 2026, as the company responds to sluggish recovery in its Wound Care business following a January 1 Medicare reimbursement reduction.

Announced publicly on April 16, 2026, the program is expected to generate approximately $40 million in annualized savings while incurring about $4 million in one-time restructuring charges in the second quarter of 2026. Management framed the move as necessary to protect future profitability, reallocating resources toward its growing Surgical business while adjusting its cost structure to a slower-than-anticipated market rebound, with further details to come alongside first-quarter 2026 results later in April.

The most recent analyst rating on (MDXG) stock is a Buy with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MiMedx Group stock, see the MDXG Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Visium Adopts New Series G Preferred and Remediation Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Visium Technologies ( (VISM) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 14, 2026, Visium Technologies’ board approved and filed a new Certificate of Designation for Series G Governing Preferred Stock under Florida law, creating a senior series that ranks pari passu with Series AA Preferred Stock and ahead of Series A, Series B, and all other equity as to dividends, liquidation preference, redemption rights, and distributions. On the same date, the company issued four shares of this Series G stock for nominal consideration to accredited investors who are existing Series AA holders or affiliates, in a private placement exempt from SEC registration rules.

In connection with the new Series G class, the board adopted a Remediation Plan for legacy Series A and B Preferred Stock issued in 2015–2016, addressing long‑expired mandatory conversion dates and documentation and proof‑of‑payment deficiencies. The plan offers qualifying investors a 125‑day window for discounted cash redemption or exchange into new unregistered common stock, while non‑qualifying holders receive no consideration, and the company plans a Florida court action to confirm these steps and now deems the probability of any Series A or B conversion remote for diluted EPS purposes, with no change to prior diluted share disclosures and no dilutive impact from Series G.

More about Visium Technologies

Visium Technologies, Inc. operates as a publicly traded company whose capital structure includes multiple classes of preferred and common stock, reflecting an investor base that spans legacy preferred shareholders and affiliated accredited investors. The company’s governance framework relies on Florida corporate law, and it actively manages its capitalization and shareholder rights through new series designations and remediation plans.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1M

For a thorough assessment of VISM stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Americas Gold and Silver reported that in the first quarter of 2026 it achieved record consolidated silver production of 787,000 ounces, up 76% from a year earlier, and record sales of 830,000 ounces, supported by strong output of lead, copper and antimony and a cash balance of US$122.6 million. These operational gains and safety milestones underscore Americas’ strategy of aggressively ramping up production capacity and automation at its flagship U.S. and Mexican mines. data.title: Tiziana Life Sciences Highlights Preclinical Long COVID Brain Fog Data for Intranasal Foralumab
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Tiziana Life Sciences ( (TLSA) ).

On April 16, 2026, Tiziana Life Sciences reported positive preclinical data from independent academic collaborators showing that intranasal anti-CD3 antibody treatment reduced neuroinflammation and improved cognition in a mouse model of Long COVID. The bioRxiv study, which evaluated a nasal anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody resembling Tiziana’s foralumab, also found increased regulatory T cells in the brain, restored hippocampal neurogenesis and reversal of “brain fog”-like deficits, reinforcing the rationale for Tiziana’s intranasal foralumab programs and potentially bolstering its positioning in post-viral neuroinflammatory indications.

The work, led by researchers at Yale University and Brigham and Women’s Hospital, used a mild respiratory SARS-CoV-2 mouse model and complementary human data showing reduced circulating Tregs in Long COVID patients with neurological symptoms. Executives said the findings validate the mechanistic foundation for ongoing clinical efforts in multiple sclerosis and other neurodegenerative diseases, and may support expansion into Long COVID “brain fog,” adding momentum to Tiziana’s broader intranasal immunotherapy platform.

The most recent analyst rating on (TLSA) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tiziana Life Sciences stock, see the TLSA Stock Forecast page.

More about Tiziana Life Sciences

Tiziana Life Sciences is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on immunotherapy delivered through alternative routes, particularly intranasal administration. Its lead asset, intranasal foralumab, a fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody, targets neuroinflammatory and neurodegenerative diseases, including non-active secondary progressive multiple sclerosis, MSA, Alzheimer’s disease and ALS.

Average Trading Volume: 174,625

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $158.1M

An update from Kaspi.kz JSC Sponsored ADR RegS ( (KSPI) ) is now available.

Kaspi.kz JSC, the Kazakhstan-based fintech platform listed on Nasdaq, held its annual general meeting of shareholders on 15 April 2026, approving its 2025 audited financial statements and confirming Deloitte LLP as external auditor for the 2026 financial year. Shareholders also endorsed remuneration for board members via stock options under a long-term incentive program.

The AGM approved a dividend of KZT 850 per common share for 2025, with payments commencing on 15 April 2026 to shareholders of record as of 14 April 2026, to be paid in cash via wire transfer. These decisions signal continued profitability, a commitment to shareholder returns and sustained engagement with international auditing standards, which together reinforce Kaspi.kz’s positioning as a maturing, shareholder-focused fintech player in its market.

data.title: MeiraGTx Reports Durable Phase 1 AQUAx Gene Therapy Data
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Meiragtx Holdings ( (MGTX) ) is now available.

On April 16, 2026, MeiraGTx reported three-year follow-up data from its Phase 1 AQUAx trial of AAV-hAQP1 in patients with grade 2/3 late radiation-induced xerostomia, showing the one-time gene therapy remained safe and well tolerated with no dose-limiting toxicity or treatment-related serious adverse events. Clinically meaningful improvements in patient-reported Xerostomia Questionnaire scores and normalization of unstimulated whole saliva flow seen at 12 months were sustained through 36 months in both unilateral and bilateral treatment cohorts.

The company said these durable responses support viewing AAV-hAQP1 as a potential first-in-class, disease-modifying therapy for this severe, lifelong condition, which affects an estimated 165,000 people in the U.S. and about 435,000 globally. MeiraGTx highlighted strong physician enthusiasm and favorable payer perceptions from market research, reinforcing the therapy’s perceived commercial potential in a concentrated treatment landscape, although the AQUAx study remains an early-stage, open-label trial primarily designed to assess safety.

The AQUAx Phase 1 trial evaluates AAV-hAQP1 delivered via Stensen’s duct to one or both parotid glands in head and neck cancer survivors who have remained cancer-free for years after radiation. Participants are followed for five years after the single administration, with safety as the primary endpoint and efficacy assessed through symptom questionnaires and changes in salivary output over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (MGTX) stock is a Buy with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Meiragtx Holdings stock, see the MGTX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MGTX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MGTX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial fundamentals—large ongoing losses, continued cash burn, and a deteriorated capital structure with negative equity—despite strong recent revenue/gross margin improvement. Technicals are constructive with the stock in an uptrend, and corporate events add support via regulatory and partnership/financing developments, but valuation remains challenging given negative earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on MGTX stock, click here.

More about Meiragtx Holdings

MeiraGTx Holdings plc is a vertically integrated, clinical-stage genetic medicines company focused on developing gene therapies for inherited and more common diseases in the eye, Parkinson’s disease, and radiation-induced xerostomia. The Nasdaq-listed group controls end-to-end in-house manufacturing, including GMP-licensed viral vector facilities and a proprietary platform for in vivo gene regulation using oral small molecules.

Average Trading Volume: 497,099

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $916.3M

For an in-depth examination of MGTX stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Lumen Technologies Establishes New Revolving Credit Facility
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Lumen Technologies ( (LUMN) ).

On April 14, 2026, Lumen Technologies entered into a new revolving credit agreement for an $825 million unsecured facility maturing on April 14, 2029, with borrowings bearing interest at Term SOFR plus a margin or a base rate plus a margin, both subject to leverage-based adjustments. Certain Lumen subsidiaries will guarantee the obligations, while Level 3 entities will provide up to $150 million of secured guarantees and Qwest entities will supply unsecured collection guarantees, establishing a layered support structure that underpins the facility and replaces the previously existing superpriority revolving/Term A credit agreement, which has been permanently terminated.

From June 30, 2026, Lumen will be subject to financial covenants, including a maximum total net leverage ratio of 5.25 to 1.00 and a minimum interest coverage ratio of 2.00 to 1.00, with customary covenants and default provisions allowing lenders to accelerate loans upon specified events. The new structure tightens ongoing leverage and coverage requirements while giving Lumen flexible, prepayable liquidity and the ability to extend unsecured guarantees to certain Qwest and Level 3 debt, simplifying its capital structure and potentially improving transparency for creditors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (LUMN) stock is a Hold with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lumen Technologies stock, see the LUMN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LUMN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LUMN is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak underlying financial performance (declining revenue, losses, and prior balance-sheet strain), partially offset by a constructive earnings outlook and balance-sheet improvement highlighted on the latest call. Technicals are moderately supportive with price above major moving averages, while valuation remains difficult to assess due to negative earnings and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on LUMN stock, click here.

More about Lumen Technologies

Lumen Technologies, Inc. is a telecommunications and technology company that provides network, cloud and security services to enterprise, government and wholesale customers. The company focuses on delivering fiber-based connectivity, edge computing and related digital infrastructure solutions across North America and international markets.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

AES ( (AES) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 14, 2026, AES announced that Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer Sherry Kohan will transition to become Chief Financial Officer of the company’s U.S. Utilities business, effective May 7, 2026. On the same date, the board appointed Managing Director of Technical Accounting Services Aubrey Jarred as Vice President, Controller, and principal accounting officer, also effective May 7, 2026, with a compensation package aligned to AES executive norms.

Jarred’s appointment brings extensive technical accounting and international reporting experience from AES, LKQ Corporation, and KPMG, supporting the company’s financial integrity as it manages complex global and clean energy operations. Separately, on April 15, 2026, AES and Bernerd Da Santos agreed that he would step down as Executive Vice President and President of US & Renewables on April 16, 2026, to become Chairman of the AES Clean Energy Board and Senior Strategic Advisor, signaling a shift in leadership roles while retaining his industry expertise within the organization.

The most recent analyst rating on (AES) stock is a Hold with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AES stock, see the AES Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AES is a Neutral.

Offsetting factors include attractive valuation (low P/E and ~5% dividend yield) and supportive corporate events from the $15/share buyout, tempered by the Bulgarian asset impairment.

The latest announcement is out from US Bancorp ( (USB) ).

U.S. Bancorp reported first-quarter 2026 results showing net revenue of $7.29 billion, net income of $1.95 billion and diluted EPS of $1.18, up 15% year over year, driven by 4.1% growth in net interest income and 6.9% growth in fee revenue. The bank posted positive operating leverage, improved efficiency, stable credit quality and a CET1 ratio of 10.8%, supported by loan and deposit growth and strong returns on equity and tangible equity.

Management highlighted that these results reflect continued execution within its medium-term financial targets and reinforce momentum across the franchise. New multi‑year partnerships with Amazon, to issue small business credit cards on the Mastercard network, and with the NFL, as an official bank and wealth management sponsor focused on player financial empowerment, are expected to deepen its small-business and wealth relationships and strengthen its national brand and payments scale.

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Inspira Technologies Oxy BHN ( (IINN) ).

Inspira Technologies Oxy B.H.N. Ltd., an Israel-based medtech firm now pivoting toward quantum computing connectivity solutions, has convened an Extraordinary General Meeting of shareholders for May 6, 2026, in Ra’anana. Only holders of ordinary shares of record at the close of business on April 21, 2026, are entitled to notice of, and to vote at, the meeting.

At the meeting, shareholders will vote on a proposal to change the company’s name to “QTREX Ltd.”, or a similar approved name, and amend its articles of association accordingly. The board unanimously supports the rebranding, arguing it better aligns the company’s identity with its new quantum connectivity strategy, and the change will take effect once cleared by the Israeli Registrar of Companies.
